title: Branch Protection Rules Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub branch security.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what are 'Branch Protection Rules' used for?
options: To restrict who can push, merge, or delete specific branches like 'main'

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using branch protection rules on your GitHub repository?
options: It ensures that only authorized changes are merged into your most important branches
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
